title_i18n.en: Vintage Disney Style Pirate Crocodile Animation

description: A multi-scene narrative prompt for a classic vintage Disney-style animation featuring a crocodile pirate and bird pirates on a ship.

description_i18n.zh-CN: 经典复古迪士尼风格动画的多场景叙事提示，讲述鳄鱼海盗和鸟类海盗在船上的故事。
description_i18n.zh-TW: 經典復古迪士尼風格動畫的多場景敘事提示，講述鱷魚海盜和鳥類海盜在船上的故事。
description_i18n.ja: ワニの海賊と鳥の海賊が船上で繰り広げる、クラシックなヴィンテージディズニースタイルアニメーションの複数シーン物語プロンプト。
description_i18n.ko: 악어 해적과 새 해적들이 배에서 펼치는 클래식 빈티지 디즈니 스타일 애니메이션의 멀티 씬 내러티브 프롬프트입니다.
description_i18n.de: Ein Multi-Szenen-Narrativ-Prompt für eine klassische Vintage-Disney-Animation mit einem Krokodilpiraten und Vogelpiraten auf einem Schiff.
description_i18n.fr: Un prompt narratif multi-scènes pour une animation classique de style Disney vintage mettant en scène un crocodile pirate et des oiseaux pirates sur un navire.
description_i18n.ru: Многосценовый нарративный промпт для классической анимации в винтажном стиле Disney с крокодилом-пиратом и птицами-пиратами на корабле.
description_i18n.es: Un prompt narrativo de múltiples escenas para una animación clásica estilo Disney vintage con un cocodrilo pirata y pájaros piratas en un barco.
description_i18n.pt-BR: Um prompt narrativo de múltiplas cenas para uma animação clássica estilo Disney vintage com um crocodilo pirata e pássaros piratas em um navio.
description_i18n.it: Un prompt narrativo multi-scena per un'animazione classica in stile Disney vintage con un coccodrillo pirata e uccelli pirati su una nave.
description_i18n.vi: Prompt tường thuật đa cảnh cho hoạt hình phong cách Disney cổ điển với cá sấu cướp biển và chim cướp biển trên tàu.
description_i18n.pl: Wieloscenowy prompt narracyjny do klasycznej animacji w stylu vintage Disney z krokodylem-piratem i ptakami-piratami na statku.
description_i18n.id: Prompt naratif multi-adegan untuk animasi klasik gaya Disney vintage yang menampilkan buaya bajak laut dan burung bajak laut di kapal.
description_i18n.nl: Een multi-scène narratieve prompt voor een klassieke vintage Disney-stijl animatie met een krokodilpiraat en vogelpiraten op een schip.
description_i18n.ar: موجه سردي متعدد المشاهد لرسوم متحركة كلاسيكية بأسلوب Disney العتيق يضم تمساح قرصان وطيور قراصنة على سفينة.
description_i18n.tr: Gemide bir timsah korsan ve kuş korsanların yer aldığı klasik vintage Disney tarzı animasyon için çok sahneli anlatı promptu.
description_i18n.uk: Багатосценовий наративний промпт для класичної анімації у вінтажному стилі Disney з крокодилом-піратом та птахами-піратами на кораблі.
description_i18n.en: A multi-scene narrative prompt for a classic vintage Disney-style animation featuring a crocodile pirate and bird pirates on a ship.

query.en: Classic vintage Disney animation style. Scene 1: On a pirate ship sailing on the sea, a fat and sinister crocodile pirate stands at the end of a plank. Three bird pirates are watching on the ship, while another bird pirate stands at the beginning of the plank, pointing a sword at the crocodile pirate. The crocodile pirate is wearing a sleeveless tight suit and is muscular. He looks at the bird pirates provocatively. Although he is a bit overwhelmed, he does not intend to give up. The bird pirates look at the crocodile pirate with evil smiles. The atmosphere is tense, and the bird pirates hope the crocodile pirate will jump off the plank into the sea below. Scene 2: The bird pirate says it's all over. He slams the plank with his claw, and the plank shakes. The crocodile pirate loses his balance and falls off the plank. Scene 3: The bird pirates let out evil laughter, but then discover that the crocodile pirate did not fall. Instead, he is grabbing the end of the plank with one hand, his arm stretched straight. Scene 4: Close-up of the crocodile pirate's upper body. A bird pirate leans down with a sly smile, reaches out a feather, and points it at the armpit of the arm the crocodile pirate is using to grab the plank, saying: "It's time to laugh out loud." Scene 5: Close-up of the feather wriggling in the crocodile's armpit, accompanied by funny sound effects. At the same time, we hear the crocodile chuckling. Scene 6: The camera focuses on the upper body of the crocodile hanging in the air, smirking, eyes closed, letting out a muffled laugh as the feather continues to tickle its armpit. Scene 7: The camera sweeps across the crocodile pirate's whole body; the bird pirate continues to tickle his armpit, and soon the crocodile pirate starts laughing out loud. Scene 8: The bird continues to tickle the crocodile pirate's armpit, making him laugh hysterically. Suddenly, the crocodile pirate laughs so hard that he lets go of the plank and falls into the sea. The bird pirate finally lets out a sly chuckle, with a satisfied smile on his face, and stands back on the plank. English voiceover.
